nasb.text: From the first day of the seventh month they began to offer burnt offerings to the Lord, but the foundation of the temple of the Lord had not been laid.

esv.text: From the first day of the seventh month they began to offer burnt offerings to the Lord. But the foundation of the temple of the Lord was not yet laid.

cnv.text: 從七月一日起，他們就開始向耶和華獻燔祭，但是那時耶和華的殿還沒有立定根基，

ccb.text: 尽管耶和华殿的根基还没有立好，从七月一日起，他们就开始向耶和华献燔祭。
